definition:
1. to be general , (Herdotus Historicus), attic:—;with genitive to be general of  an army, (Herdotus Historicus), attic:—; to lead as general , with dative, ἐστρατήγησε Λακεδαιμονίοισι (Herdotus Historicus); with accusative cognate, στρ. πόλεμον to conduct  war, (Demosthenes Orator): with neuter adjective, to do  a thing as general , τοῦτο (Xenophon Historicus); πάντα (Demosthenes Orator):—;Pass. to be conducted , (Plato Philosophus) 
2. metaphorically, ποῦ σὺ στρατηγεῖς τοῦδ; how claim'st  thou to command  this man? (Sophocles Tragicus) (ML)
